channel.title: The World This Hour
channel.description: Catch up on the day's most important news from Canada and around the world in 5 minutes. Updated every hour, 24/7. Last 3 episodes.
channel.itunes:summary: Catch up on the day's most important news from Canada and around the world in 5 minutes. Updated every hour, 24/7.
channel.itunes:author: CBC
